name: hyntor
description: Hyntor - Don't just get the answer. Actually learn it. A responsible-AI study platform.

scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:push:prod: npm run gen:prod-schema && npm run push:prod --workspace packages/db
scripts.vercel-build: npm run gen:prod-schema && npm run generate:prod --workspace packages/db && npm run push:prod --workspace packages/db && npm run build
